violations.evidence: No TLS configured. No helmet or HSTS middleware in dependencies.
No csurf or equivalent package in dependencies.
No helmet or CSP middleware in dependencies.

violations.requirement_text: Apply least-privilege and role-based access control
violations.evidence: No RBAC library in dependencies. No auth middleware.

violations.requirement_text: Apply rate limiting to all externally reachable API endpoints
violations.evidence: No express-rate-limit or equivalent in dependencies.

violations.requirement_text: End users MUST be authenticated through a central identity provider
violations.evidence: No authentication library (passport, jwt, etc.) in dependencies.

violations.requirement_text: Validate all external input as restrictively as possible
violations.evidence: No input validation library (joi, zod, express-validator) in dependencies.

violations.requirement_text: All data transmitted over external networks MUST be encrypted with TLS
violations.evidence: Dockerfile exposes port 3000 with no TLS. No HTTPS configuration.

violations.requirement_text: Pin direct dependencies to exact versions
Containers MUST NOT run as root
violations.evidence: Dockerfile has no USER directive. Container runs as UID 0.

violations.requirement_text: Pin base images to an immutable digest
violations.evidence: FROM node:20-alpine uses mutable tag. No SHA256 digest.
No logging library (morgan, winston, pino) in dependencies.
